hero.subtitle: Face, breasts & body contouring. An international congress bringing together experts for scientific exchange and professional discussion.

speakers.name: Dr. Romeu Fadul Jr.
speakers.title: Licensed Plastic Surgeon, São Paulo, Brazil

sessions.name: Breast Surgery
sessions.description: Four expert presentations exploring contemporary approaches to breast augmentation, reduction, reconstruction, and revision surgery, followed by an interactive discussion focused on clinical decision-making and outcomes.

sessions.name: Body Contouring
sessions.description: A session dedicated to modern body contouring techniques, including abdominoplasty, liposuction, and combination procedures, concluding with a case-based discussion.

sessions.name: Facial Surgery
sessions.description: Four presentations covering key aspects of facial aesthetic surgery, from surgical planning to refined technique, followed by open discussion and exchange of experience.

sessions.name: Clinical Philosophy
sessions.description: A reflective session on surgical thinking, patient selection, ethics, and long-term vision in plastic surgery practice, ending with a moderated discussion.

sessions.name: Surgical Drawing & Marking
sessions.description: Practical presentations focused on preoperative marking and surgical planning principles for breast, abdomen, liposuction, and face procedures, followed by discussion and clinical insights.

testimonials.quote: KPSM is where the real conversations happen. The masterclasses alone justified the trip — but the hallway discussions between sessions were equally transformative for my practice.
testimonials.name: Dr. Sofia Reyes

testimonials.quote: The clinical philosophy session opened my eyes to possibilities I had not considered. I returned home and completely restructured my pre-operative workflow.
testimonials.name: Dr. Raj Patel

testimonials.quote: As an early-career surgeon, the mentorship programme at KPSM connected me with leaders who have genuinely shaped my trajectory. The calibre of faculty is unmatched.
testimonials.name: Dr. Lina Hoffmann

venue.title: Kaunas, Lithuania
venue.description: The conference will take place at Drobės Fabrikas in Kaunas — a unique industrial venue that blends historic character with modern functionality. Its contemporary spaces provide an inspiring setting for professional exchange, learning, and networking in a distinctive architectural environment.
venue.transport: Direct flights from major EU hubs

cta.heading: Join us in Kaunas
cta.description: Early bird registration is open until 30 April. Includes full meeting access, proceedings, welcome reception, and gala dinner.

footer.brand_text: The premier plastic and reconstructive surgery meeting in the Baltics. Kaunas, Lithuania.
